creator: castilloeduardo@outlook.com.ar
text:
(In reply to Jose Alonso Cardenas Marquez from comment #6)

I do not know if you can add this information in the installer 
or if there is a wiki or something similar for me to collaborate with this information and the correct configuration

for wsjt functions you need to add this

-----------------

Added the following to /etc/devfs.rules:

add path 'cuaU[0-9]*' mode 666
add path 'dsp[0-9]\*' mode 666

Create ~.asoundrc to map OSS device names to ALSA
